title: Automations for changing item status based on mirrored subitem statuses
excerpt:
I have a high level Masterboard with each item referring to a client who have their own board. The sub-items of this Masterboard are linked to the Client board. The sub-items have columns mirrored from the Client Board. 
…

posts.author: Rohan-TAP (Rohan Bhatia)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a high level Masterboard with each item referring to a client who have their own board. The sub-items of this Masterboard are linked to the Client board. The sub-items have columns mirrored from the Client Board.

I need an automation recipe such that when all the mirrored statuses in the subitem are changed to ‘Done’, the status of the item in the Masterboard is also changed to ‘Done’. However, it doesn’t seem to allow for such an automation. What are the workarounds or alternatives for this?

image1289×159 19.1 KB

posts.author: Cleopatra-upstream (Cleopatra Luneburg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Rohan-TAP

Without looking closely to your boards etc or what Plan you are on, try taking a look at this article to see if can assist you with multi board mirroring.
